title: Automobile Sales Training - Realigning The Drive Mindset
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable customer-facing workshop for improving automobile sales training - realigning the drive mindset performance.
whyThisMatters: Automobile Sales Training - Realigning The Drive Mindset helps sales, marketing, and service teams improve automobile sales training - realigning the drive mindset through clearer conversations, stronger follow-through, and more consistent customer handling. Participants practise Coaching Objectives and Workplace Application, The NLP Communication Model, and Principles for Success so they can apply the skills in real customer situations.
builtFor: Employees who manage customer conversations or expectations
walkAwayWith: Use clearer service or sales behaviors in everyday interactions.
Respond to difficult moments with more structure and confidence.
Align practical standards across the team.
methodologyCaption: Participants practise workplace conversations and customer-facing scenarios through role-play, feedback, and group reflection.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Automobile Sales Training - Realigning The Drive Mindset.md
